About.eyebrow: Used cars in Benidorm · Costa Blanca
About.imageAlt: Mercedes-Benz emblem — MB Plus Benidorm used car dealership, Alicante
About.title: Used car dealership in Benidorm
About.intro: MB Plus Benidorm is a used car dealership in Benidorm specialising in quality pre-owned cars across the Costa Blanca, with a focus on Mercedes-Benz. With over 10 years of experience and our own workshop, every car is inspected, prepared and backed by warranty before delivery.
About.pillarWarrantyDesc: All our cars are delivered with a recent technical inspection and a warranty of up to 12 months or 10,000 km.
About.pillarWorkshopDesc: We inspect, prepare and maintain every car at our own workshop in L'Albir before delivery.
About.pillarSpecialistsDesc: Our main focus is Mercedes-Benz cars, although we also work with other well-known brands.
About.pillarExperienceDesc: More than a decade helping our customers find the car they need, at the price they are looking for.

Contact.title: Visit us or get in touch
Contact.near: We are in L'Albir — easy access from Benidorm, Altea and Calpe.
